# PdfPix

> Free browser-based PDF tools for merging, splitting, compressing, converting, editing, protecting, and organizing PDF files.

Canonical site: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/
Sitemap: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/sitemap.xml
Contact: mailto:contact.uthakkan@gmail.com

## Core pages
- [Home](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/): Privacy-first PDF tools landing page
- [About](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/about/): Brand, mission, and founder background
- [Blog](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/blog/): Guides about PDF workflows, AI tools, founder stories, and product ecosystem updates
- [Pricing](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/pricing/): Pricing and support details
- [Privacy](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/privacy/): Data handling and privacy commitments
- [Terms](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/terms/): Terms of use
- [Contact](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/contact/): Support and partnership contact

## Popular tools
- [Merge PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/merge-pdf/): Combine PDF files in-browser
- [Split PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/split-pdf/): Extract pages or page ranges
- [Compress PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/compress-pdf/): Reduce PDF file size
- [PDF to Word](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/pdf-to-word/): Convert PDF files into editable DOCX
- [Word to PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/word-to-pdf/): Convert DOCX into PDF
- [PDF to JPG](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/pdf-to-jpg/): Export pages as images
- [JPG to PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/jpg-to-pdf/): Combine images into PDF
- [OCR PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/ocr-pdf/): Extract searchable text from scans
- [Protect PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/protect-pdf/): Add password protection
- [Redact PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/redact-pdf/): Remove sensitive information permanently

## Product notes
- PdfPix emphasizes privacy-first, browser-based processing.
- The site focuses on direct workflows without account creation.
- Tool pages include instructional content, internal tool recommendations, and browser-based workflows.
